sourceSummary.oneLine: HAD1717MC/MG 디텍터의 최종 사양, 개발 목표 대비 실적, 신뢰성 시험 결과, 인증 관련 예산 및 설계이관문서 목록을 정리한 개발 완료 보고서이다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: KGMP 심사용 개발완료보고서로 사용되는 DHF 문서 경로에 포함되어 있으며, 제품 사양과 신뢰성 시험 Pass 결과 및 향후 CE, FDA, RoHS2 인증 예산을 제시한다.
keyPoints: 문서 제목은 “HAD1717MC/MG 개발 완료 보고”이고 문서일자는 “2019. 05. 22”이다.
최종 사양에는 a-Si TFT, 3072 x 3072 Total Pixel Matrix, 430 x 430 mm Total Pixel Area, 140 μm Pixel Pitch가 기재되어 있다.
HAD1717MG는 GDX: Tb, HAD1717MC는 CsI: Ti Scintillator Type으로 기재되어 있다.
신뢰성 Test 결과에서 초기검사, 환경시험, 성능시험, Drop, 진동, IP등급, 가압 시험 항목이 Pass로 표시되어 있다.
향후 집행 필요 예산에는 RoHS2 인증 및 CE, FDA 인증 비용이 포함되어 있다.

entities.name: 한국SGS
entities.evidence: Medical & Vet 인증 \ 50,000,000 \ 8,800,000 한국SGS 제품 신뢰성 비용

entities.name: Abyz
entities.evidence: Abyz GMP 인증 - \ 2,332,000 GMP 적합성 심사 집행 비용

concepts.name: GMP 적합성 심사
concepts.evidence: GMP 인증 - \ 2,332,000 GMP 적합성 심사 집행 비용

evidence.claim: The document title is HAD1717MC/MG 개발 완료 보고.
The document date is 2019. 05. 22.
The document is associated with the detector development team.
HAD1717MG uses GDX: Tb scintillator type.
HAD1717MC uses CsI: Ti scintillator type.
The detector sensor type is a-Si TFT.
The final spec lists Total Pixel Matrix as 3072 x 3072 pixels.
The final spec lists Total Pixel Area as 430 x 430 mm.
The final spec lists Pixel Pitch as 140 μm.
The final spec lists Data Transfer as 1Gbps Ethernet.
The final spec lists the energy range as 40 to 150 kVp.
The final spec lists waterproof rating as IPX4.
The final spec lists trigger modes as Line Trigger Mode and AED Mode.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line Tigger Mode / AED Mode

evidence.claim: The development completion performance lists preview time about 2 seconds and cycle time about 3 seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: Preview Time (약 2 Sec) Cycle Time (약 3 Sec)

evidence.claim: The development completion performance lists dimensions as 460 x 460 x 15.4 mm and weight as 3.75 kg.
Reliability test results show environmental tests passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 환경시험 고온고습저장 시험 60℃ 80% / 603HR Pass 저온동작 시험 -10℃ / 16HR Pass 고온동작 시험 50℃ / 16HR Pass 저온저장 시험 -20℃ / 48HR Pass 고온저장 시험 70℃ / 48HR Pass 열충격 시험 -20℃ ⇔ 70℃ 30Cycle Pass

evidence.claim: Product drop testing passed at 1 m on wood plate over 5 faces and 2 corners.
IP grade testing used IPX4 and passed.
Future required execution budget includes RoHS2 certification.
Future required execution budget includes CE and FDA certification, with FDA cost 17,000,000 and CE cost 15,000,000.
GMP certification cost is listed as GMP conformity review execution cost.
evidence.evidenceText: GMP 인증 - \ 2,332,000 GMP 적합성 심사 집행 비용

evidence.claim: Design transfer document list items were reviewed with no special matters and marked P.
evidence.evidenceText: 설계이관문서 List No. 문서 항목 검토 결과 P/F 비고 1 Spec Sheet 특이사항 없음 P

reviewFlags.reason: revisionOrVersion is not present in the source text.
authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text only mentions FDA as a future certification budget item, not as an issuing authority, clearance, approval, or completed regulatory status.
productSignal lists HAD/A/F 1417-1717, while the source title and specifications identify HAD1717MC/MG; relationship is not explained in the source text.
Some terms appear with possible OCR or source spelling issues, including “Line Tigger Mode”, “MCU Fimware”, and “PVB Gerber File”.
